subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Promised One foretold in the Books of God, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لهو الموعود فی کتب الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
